_meta.note: MAC directory for owl.red. Consumed by Technitium DHCP to build static lease reservations. MAC format: uppercase hex, dash-separated (AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF). TBD entries require device to be powered on / provisioned before filling in.

vlan10_network_devices.description: Infrastructure management — DHCP range 10.0.10.100-199 served by Technitium on k8s. All known devices have MAC reservations; pool handles unknown devices.

reservations.comments: OPNsense VM (VMID 100) on edge.pve — VLAN 10 gateway, firewall. Intel I340-T4 PCIe passthrough NIC.
reservations.macSource: ARP at 10.0.10.1 via edge.pve (Intel I340-T4 port 0, fully passed through to OPNsense VM); switch port SW19

reservations.comments: Supermicro CSE-523L-505B — PVE host, router node (OPNsense PCIe passthrough host)
Rosewill RSV-L4500U / Supermicro X10SRi-F — PVE host, storage node. NIC2 (LAN2) will be PVE management NIC.
reservations.macSource: IPMI page: System LAN2 MAC address ac:1f:6b:47:87:f1 — NIC2 not yet connected to switch (future PVE mgmt)

reservations.comments: Unraid (currently bare metal on NIC1; will be VM on storage.pve when PVE migration complete) — NFS/SMB storage, Plex media
reservations.macSource: IPMI page: System LAN1 MAC address ac:1f:6b:47:87:f0; confirmed by ARP at 10.0.10.5 via edge.pve; switch port SW07

reservations.comments: Supermicro X10SRi-F IPMI/BMC — remote management for storage.pve.owl.red
reservations.macSource: IPMI page: BMC MAC Address ac:1f:6b:4b:b5:e7 at IP 10.0.10.6; switch port SW06

reservations.comments: APC AP7900B PDU — rack PDU management (2 units, front IP only)
Lenovo ThinkCentre M73 #1 — PVE host, k8s control plane node
Lenovo ThinkCentre M73 #2 — PVE host, k8s control plane node
Lenovo ThinkCentre M73 #3 — PVE host, k8s control plane node
Lenovo ThinkCentre M73 #4 — PVE host, k8s worker node
Talos VM (VMID 601) on cp1.pve — k8s control plane node
Talos VM (VMID 602) on cp2.pve — k8s control plane node
Talos VM (VMID 603) on cp3.pve — k8s control plane node
Talos VM (VMID 604) on worker1.pve — k8s worker node
D-Link DIR-885L running OpenWrt — WAP management
Technitium DNS — DNS service endpoint (k8s cluster, HA via MetalLB)
Proxmox Datacenter Manager — LXC container (VMID 231) on cp1.pve
Proxmox Backup Server VM on storage.pve

vlan20_private_net.description: Trusted devices — wired and WiFi. DHCP pool active; reservations added per device as needed.

vlan30_guest_net.description: Guest WiFi — captive portal, internet only. No permanent reservations expected.

vlan40_iot_no_inter.description: IoT — local only, no internet. Reservations added per device.

vlan50_iot_with_inter.description: IoT — internet permitted, no lateral movement. Reservations added per device.
